name: sheetedit
description: Standalone client-side spreadsheet editor for .xlsx and .ods: edit cells and formulas in a grid and export a valid workbook, preserving styles and other parts, all in the browser.

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:demo && start-server-and-test 'vite preview --port 5173 --strictPort' http://localhost:5173 'cypress run --browser chrome'
